summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OS Theme Hub - Linux theme manager for Zorin OS. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly. App successfully allows theme management with Arabic UI.
passed_tests: All 22 backend API endpoints working correctly
Dashboard loads with correct statistics (5 desktop, 4 boot, 9 total themes)
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Desktop Themes, Boot Themes, Customization, Favorites)
Theme card interactions (favorite, preview, apply buttons)
Filter functionality on Desktop Themes page (all, macOS, Windows)
Customization controls (accent color, icon theme, font family, font size slider)
Arabic text displays properly throughout the app
Dark theme with glassmorphism effects working correctly
Theme application and preview (simulated as expected)
Error handling for non-existent themes (404 responses)
